emails.subject: MO PRESENTATION
emails.body: MO PRESENTATION Some thoughts I have been working on that you may find interesting I intend to present to the groups her in London next week as opportunity to (re)introduce myself As always I would welcome your comments mike Forwarded by Mike Jordan/LON/ECT on 15/06/2000 13:49 Fiona McNaught 15/06/2000 10:04

emails.subject: RE: MO Presentation
emails.body: RE: MO Presentation Could I be included in these update meetings? Rather than read the material after the fact and have you review it with me separately, it seems that it would make sense for me to be included in the update meeting that you hold with Rick. Assuming that Rick is comfortable with that, can we do that going forward? If all agree, please ask your assistant to let me know if a date has already been set for the next update. Thanks.
